features.name: Mimicry
features.description: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a whisper or chitter. A hearer can discern the sounds are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.

actions.name: Beak
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Scout - Intelligent bird with mimicry and reconnaissance
tactical_info.positioning: Uses flight and mimicry for deception and scouting
tactical_info.damage_output: 1 piercing per hit, minimal direct combat
tactical_info.key_abilities: Mimicry for deception, good perception, flight mobility
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very low HP makes it extremely fragile
tactical_info.synergies: Perfect familiar, messenger, or intelligence-gathering tool
